description: MCP server for persistent memory and deterministic protocol-chain execution for AI agents.
rules: Follow `next_action` exactly when `must_obey` is `true`. Do not respond to the user until the protocol run is complete (after calling kairos_attest).
Echo server-generated `nonce` and `proof_hash` verbatim in solutions. Never compute hashes yourself.
Protocol order is fixed: kairos_search → kairos_begin → kairos_next (loop) → kairos_attest. Never skip or reorder steps.
For step 1, use `challenge.proof_hash`. For later steps, use the `proof_hash` returned by the previous kairos_next.
Errors include a fresh challenge. Retry using the data in the error response — do not re-call kairos_begin.
Space names are used at the tool interface; never pass raw space IDs as tool arguments.
When `must_obey` is `false`, use judgment; prefer kairos_update to repair a broken step before aborting.
